<?php namespace Spatie\LaravelRay\Watchers; use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Event; use Spatie\LaravelRay\Ray; use Spatie\Ray\Settings\Settings; class ViewWatcher extends Watcher { public function register(): void { $settings = app(Settings::class); $this->enabled = $settings->send_views_to_ray; Event::listen('composing:*', function ($event, $data) { if (! $this->enabled()) { return; } /** @var \Illuminate\View\View $view */ $view = $data[0]; $ray = app(Ray::class)->view($view); optional($this->rayProxy)->applyCalledMethods($ray); }); } }
